product_overview: Zakerly is an Arabic, RTL SaaS platform for teachers to create, publish, and share online homework with students via a public link; teachers can view results and rankings while students complete homeworks anonymously via the share link.
core_goals: Enable teachers to sign up, authenticate, and manage an account
Allow teachers to create, save, publish, and share homework with students
Provide a public student flow: start, submit, and immediately view score/ranking
Persist and present student submissions and rankings to the originating teacher
Enforce authorization and protect teacher-only routes and data
Support Arabic RTL layout and responsive behavior across desktop and mobile

features.name: Landing Page UI
features.description: Public homepage with Arabic RTL content and primary CTA to onboard teachers.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll through sections -> See Arabic hero text and features -> Click main CTA button -> Navigate to /signup
Navigate to / -> Look for main CTA button -> If CTA button is missing then record missing CTA as failure

features.name: Premium Authentication (Signup & Login)
features.description: Signup and login pages with real-time validation, glassmorphism UI, and password visibility toggle.
user_flows: Navigate to /signup -> Fill signup name field -> Fill signup email field -> Fill signup password field -> Submit signup form -> See redirect to /dashboard -> See welcome/profile present on /dashboard
Navigate to /signup -> Fill invalid email in email field -> Fill password field -> Submit signup form -> See validation error for email
Navigate to /login -> Fill login email field -> Fill login password field -> Toggle password visibility -> Submit login form -> See redirect to /dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill incorrect password -> Submit login form -> See authentication error message

features.name: Account Management (Settings)
features.description: Authenticated settings area where teachers update profile, adjust behaviors, logout, or delete their account.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> Update personal information fields -> Submit profile update -> See success confirmation
Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> Enter invalid data in profile field -> Submit profile update -> See validation error message
Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> Toggle homework behavior option -> Save settings -> See persisted toggle state on reload
Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> Click logout -> Confirm logout -> See redirect to /login
Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> Click delete account -> See warning confirmation dialog -> Cancel deletion -> Stay on /dashboard/settings
Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> Click delete account -> Confirm deletion -> See account removed and redirect to /

features.name: Teacher Dashboard & Homework List
features.description: Authenticated dashboard showing overview and list of teacher homeworks with empty-state handling.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See teacher overview widgets -> Click Homeworks link -> Navigate to /dashboard/hw -> See list of homeworks or empty state
Navigate to /dashboard/hw -> If no homeworks then see empty state message and CTA to create homework
Navigate to /dashboard -> If unauthenticated then attempt to load -> See redirect to /login

features.name: Create Homework
features.description: Page for creating a homework with title and multiple-choice questions; supports saving and validation.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/create -> Fill homework title field -> Add question text field -> Add choices for the question -> Mark one choice as correct -> Save homework draft -> See saved homework card returned by /dashboard/hw
Navigate to /dashboard/create -> Leave homework title empty -> Add question -> Try to save -> See validation error for missing title
Navigate to /dashboard/create -> Fill title -> Add question without marking a correct answer -> Try to save -> See validation error for missing correct answer

features.name: Publish Homework & Share Link
features.description: Publish workflow to make a homework publicly accessible and generate a unique share link (copy to clipboard).
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/hw -> Click Publish on a draft homework card -> See published state on the card
Navigate to /dashboard/hw -> On a published homework click Copy link -> See confirmation that link was copied to clipboard
Navigate to /dashboard/hw -> Click Publish -> Receive share link -> Open share link in a fresh unauthenticated session -> See student start page with homework title
Navigate to /dashboard/hw -> Attempt to open share link for an unpublished homework -> See not found or unavailable state

features.name: Student Start & Homework Flow (Public)
features.description: Anonymous public flow for students opening the share link, entering a name, completing homework, and viewing results/ranking.
user_flows: Open published share link (public URL) in a fresh unauthenticated session -> See homework title and start form -> Fill student name field -> Submit student start form -> See questions list
Open share link -> Leave student name empty -> Submit start form -> See validation error for missing name
Open share link -> Fill answers for all questions -> Submit answers -> See result page with score and ranking
Open share link -> Submit answers a second time from same browser/session -> See duplicate submission blocked or one-attempt message

features.name: Teacher Results & Reporting
features.description: Teacher-facing results page showing student submissions, scores, ordering/ranking and aggregated stats.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/hw -> Click Results on a homework card -> See list of student submissions with scores and timestamps
Navigate to /dashboard/hw -> Click Results -> Verify a recent student entry shows correct score and expected ranking position
Navigate to /dashboard/hw -> Click Results for a homework owned by another teacher (simulate other teacher's id) -> See access denied or not authorized message

features.name: Protected Routes & Authorization
features.description: Enforce authentication on teacher-only routes and ensure authorization boundaries between teachers.
user_flows: Visit /dashboard while not authenticated -> See redirect to /login
Visit /dashboard/settings while not authenticated -> See redirect to /login
Login as Teacher A -> Navigate to /dashboard/hw -> Attempt to access a homework of Teacher B by manipulating id -> See access denied or 404
Login as a teacher -> Reload /dashboard -> See session persists and dashboard remains accessible -> Click logout -> Attempt to reload /dashboard -> See redirect to /login

features.name: Arabic UI & Mobile Responsiveness
features.description: Verify Arabic text, RTL layout, and responsive behavior on desktop and mobile for major teacher and student screens.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Inspect page layout -> See HTML dir attribute or CSS indicating RTL -> Verify major labels display Arabic text
Navigate to / -> Set mobile viewport -> Scroll through sections -> Verify hero, CTA and text are readable and clickable
Open share link -> Set narrow/mobile viewport -> Fill student name -> Complete homework -> Submit answers -> See results page remains usable on mobile

routes.description: Premium landing page with hero mockup and features
User login page with split-panel design
User signup page with split-panel design

features.name: Landing Page UI
features.description: Vibrant landing page with interactive elements and animations

features.name: Premium Authentication
features.description: Login and signup with real-time feedback and glassmorphism

features.name: Account Management
features.description: Comprehensive settings with profile updates, logout, and account deletion
user_interactions: Click delete account with warning confirmation
